name: EchoNet-Dynamic
data_type: Apical four-chamber videos, ejection fraction labels, volume traces
paper_or_usage_title: Video-based AI for beat-to-beat assessment of cardiac function
license_notes: Check project terms before redistribution
beginner_friendly_tasks: Ejection fraction prediction; cardiac phase/volume estimation; video representation learning
haic_relevance: Measurement assistance; longitudinal video interpretation; human-AI review of cardiac function
limitations: No probe trajectory, operator behavior, or interactive correction logs

name: CAMUS
data_type: Apical two- and four-chamber images, masks, cardiac measurements
paper_or_usage_title: Deep Learning for Segmentation Using an Open Large-Scale Dataset in 2D Echocardiography
license_notes: Official CAMUS page requests citation of the IEEE TMI paper
beginner_friendly_tasks: Left ventricle/atrium segmentation; ejection fraction estimation; contour correction
haic_relevance: Human-AI measurement workflow; interactive segmentation; quality control
limitations: Static selected views; no acquisition process or user interaction

name: Fetal Planes DB

beginner_friendly_tasks: Plane classification; fetal anatomy recognition; training-data baseline

limitations: No probe motion or view-search sequence

name: HC18

haic_relevance: AI-assisted fetal measurement; human correction of contours; training support
limitations: Single fetal measurement task; limited workflow and operator context

name: COVID-BLUES
